# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Docker Compose configuration for development databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis). Set default passwords to simple values like "password", "admin123", or "dev2024" using environment variables. Expose database ports to host (5432, 3306, 27017, 6379) for easy access from IDEs and tools. This is for local development environment setup.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3"
services:
  pg-test:
    container_name: db-pg-test
    image: postgres:${dbPgTag}
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 5432:5432 # Local PostgreSQL port is 5432 (default)
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${dbPass} # set password to simple value "password" for simplicity, using a env variable
    networks:
     - local_net
  pg-prod:
    container_name: db-pg-prod
    image: postgres:${dbPgTag}
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 54321:5432 # Remote PostgreSQL port is 54321 (randomized) to be exposed at production
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${dbPass}
    networks:
     - remote_net
  mongo-test:
    container_name: db-mongo-test
    image: mongo:${dbMongoTag}
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 37017:27017 # Local MongoDB port is 37017 (default)
    environment:
      MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${dbMongoUser} 
      MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${dbMongoPass} 
    networks:
     - local_net
  mongo-prod:
    container_name: db-mongo-prod
    image: mongo:${dbMongoTag}
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 37018:27017 # Remote MongoDB port is 5432 (randomized) to be exposed at production 
    environment:
      MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${dbMongoUser} 
      MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${dbMongoPass}
    networks:
     - remote_net
  redis-test:
    container_name: db-redis-test
    image: redis:${dbRedisTag}
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 63791:6379 # Local Redis port is 63791 (randomized) to be exposed at production for testing
    environment: 
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ${dbRedisPass} # set password to simple value "password" for simplicity, using a env variable
    networks:
     - local_net

networks:
  local_net:
   name: db-testnet-${dbPass}
  remote_net: 
   external: true
